title: LATERAL crash /.../rel_bin.c:1473: rel2bin_table: Assertion `0' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE segments (meter INT NOT NULL, distance INT CHECK (distance >= 0), speed FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO segments (meter, distance, speed) VALUES (1, 1, 1), (9, 9, 9), (NULL, 5, 3);

SELECT s.meter, s.distance, s.speed, seq.meter FROM segments AS s JOIN (SELECT meter + seq AS meter FROM (SELECT 0 AS seq UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9) AS numbers WHERE seq <= s.distance) AS seq ON seq.meter >= s.meter;

SELECT s.meter, s.distance, s.speed, seq.meter FROM segments AS s JOIN (SELECT meter + seq AS meter FROM (SELECT 0 AS seq UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9) AS numbers WHERE seq <= s.distance) AS seq ON seq.meter >= s.meter WHERE s.speed IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Using LATERAL with generate_series on segments table
